---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to the project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe a concrete scenario, not an abstract capability.

## Why it fits

This is a personal hobby project for managing **ProtonVPN on a GL.iNet Flint 2** from a **single home LAN**. Features that extend this scope (different routers, different VPN providers, multi-tenant usage, commercial features) are unlikely to be accepted — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).

Why does this fit the project's scope?

## Proposed behaviour

What should the UI / API / router interaction look like?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why did you rule them out?

## Additional context

Mockups, links, prior art, etc.
